SEARCH

Deprecated API

Contents

  • Terminally Deprecated
  • Fields
  • Methods
  • Terminally Deprecated Elements
    Element
    Description
    io.goobi.viewer.model.search.SearchFacets.getActiveFacetsCopy()
    Use SearchFacets.getActiveFacets() which now already returns a defensive copy.
  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    io.goobi.viewer.model.security.IPrivilegeHolder.PRIV_GENERATE_IIIF_MANIFEST
    iiif manifests are now always allowed, but individual resources therein may not be, depending on specific privileges
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    io.goobi.viewer.controller.Configuration.getDownloadUrl()
    because download uri is now built from request in DownloadBean
    io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans.ConfigurationBean.isSidebarCalendarLinkVisible()
    View has been retired
    io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans.NavigationHelper.getCalendarActiveUrl()
    Calendar view has been retired; use getTocActiveUrl()
    io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans.NavigationHelper.getCalendarUrl()
    Calendar view has been retired; use getTocUrl()
    io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.media.CMSMediaItem.getAlternativeTextOld()
    io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.media.CMSMediaItem.setAlternativeText(String)
    io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.pages.content.types.CMSPageListContent.getSortedCategories(int, boolean, boolean, CMSTemplateManager)
    use CMSPageListContent.getSortedCategories(boolean, CMSTemplateManager) instead
    io.goobi.viewer.model.search.SearchFacets.getActiveFacetsCopy()
    Use SearchFacets.getActiveFacets() which now already returns a defensive copy.
    io.goobi.viewer.model.security.License.getClient()
    io.goobi.viewer.model.security.License.getClientId()
    io.goobi.viewer.model.security.License.getIpRange()
    io.goobi.viewer.model.security.License.getUser()
    io.goobi.viewer.model.security.License.getUserGroup()
    io.goobi.viewer.model.security.License.setClient(ClientApplication)
    io.goobi.viewer.model.security.License.setIpRange(IpRange)
    io.goobi.viewer.model.security.License.setUser(User)
    io.goobi.viewer.model.security.License.setUserGroup(UserGroup)
    io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.ViewManager.isDisplayCalendarViewLink()
    Calendar view has been combined with TOC view
